title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Freight Container Backlog Signals Industrial Sector Pressure
thesis: A rise in searches for freight container backlog indicates growing logistics bottlenecks, often preceding industrial sector stress. Industrial companies face margin pressure from supply chain delays.
signal_logic: If weekly Google Trends searches for 'freight container backlog' increase by 15% week-over-week
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly Google Trends searches for 'freight container backlog' increase by 15% week-over-week Exit: After 3 weeks or when search volume declines 10% from peak
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly searches via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight logistics bottlenecks regularly fluctuate due to seasonal demand and port congestion.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends searches for 'freight container backlog' signals industrial sector pressure
schema.behavior: A rise in searches for freight container backlog indicates growing logistics bottlenecks, often preceding industrial sector stress.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial companies face margin pressure from supply chain delays.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends searches for 'freight container backlog' increase by 15% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or when search volume declines 10% from peak

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight logistics bottlenecks regularly fluctuate due to seasonal demand and port congestion.
